signals.headline: Powell confirms he will remain Fed Chair if successor not confirmed by May term end** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][
signals.raw:
Powell confirms he will remain Fed Chair if successor not confirmed by May term end** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Jerome Powell stated on Wednesday during a post-Fed meeting press conference that he will stay on as chair pro-tem if his successor is not Senate-confirmed by May, when his term ends, citing legal precedent and past Fed practices[1][2]. No successor confirmation, announcement
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Mavericks' Cooper Flagg Exits Rookie Season Finale with Ankle Sprain** | NO | HIGH confidence[4][6]
signals.raw:
Mavericks' Cooper Flagg Exits Rookie Season Finale with Ankle Sprain** | NO | HIGH confidence[4][6]

Flagg, the No. 1 overall pick, recorded 10 points, 4 rebounds, and 1 assist in 9 minutes before suffering a left ankle sprain and being ruled out in Dallas' regular-season finale loss (149-128), ending his rookie campaign without playoffs as the Mavericks target the draft lottery[2][4][6]. Despite

signals.raw:
Elon Musk April 2026 Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" where the 1120-1159 range trades at 22-24% odds, backed by over $21.5M-$21.7M volume across Tweet and Trending Markets categories[2][3].  
No direct X posts from traders, whale bets, or misprice
